prompt: You've been handed a bd task (ID in seeded_ids.json). Apply infinifu:work-do end-to-end to implement it. Follow the skill: claim via in_progress, TDD, commit, record evidence in task notes, and report back — do NOT close the task yourself (the reviewer owns that transition).

assertions.text: Task status is in_progress (claimed) and NOT closed
tests/test_slugs.py exists and contains at least 4 pytest tests
pytest tests/test_slugs.py -v passes cleanly (0 failures, 4+ tests collected)
slugify('  Multi   space!!! ') returns 'multi-space' when invoked
Task has at least one note/comment that includes 'IMPLEMENTED' or 'Evidence'
Agent made at least one git commit beyond the seed
Agent did not silently implement unicode handling (out-of-scope) — either no non-ASCII test OR a discovery task was filed
A report file was written to outputs/ (report.md or run_notes.md) describing the work
